nasb.text: Hold them guilty, O God; By their own devices let them fall! In the multitude of their transgressions thrust them out, For they are rebellious against You.

esv.text: Make them bear their guilt, O God; let them fall by their own counsels; because of the abundance of their transgressions cast them out, for they have rebelled against you.

cnv.text: 神啊！求你定他們的罪； 願他們因自己的詭計跌倒， 願你因他們許多的過犯，把他們趕出去， 因為他們背叛了你。

ccb.text: 上帝啊， 求你定他们的罪， 让他们作茧自缚。 他们背叛你，罪恶深重， 求你把他们赶走。

csbs.text: 神哪，求你使他们承担罪责！ 愿他们因自己的计谋而跌倒； 求你因他们众多的过犯驱赶他们， 因为他们悖逆了你。
